title: LuhTech Schema Registry v1.7.0
description: Canonical schema URI registry for all LuhTech Holdings schemas. Maps schema roles to versioned files. v1.7.0: adds venture-domains schema v1.0, roadmap v3.2, venture-summary v2.1.

changes: venture-domains schema: v1.0.0 (NEW) — per-venture domain profile, T1 canonical source
roadmap schema: v3.1 → v3.2 (adds venture.webPresence pointer block)
venture-summary schema: v2.0 → v2.1 (adds webPresence derived block)
Part of LUHTECH-DEVPROMPT-DOMAIN-001 domain catalog integration
roadmap schema: v2.4 → v3.1 (adds mission/vision/currentStage/overallProgress to venture block)
venture-summary schema: v1.0 → v2.0 (adds required meta provenance block, DERIVED ARTIFACT warning)
transform-template schema: v1.0 (NEW) — governs transform template file format
Source: Transform Fabric Architecture Strategy v2.0.0 — 2026-02-26

roadmap.description: Technical canonical source — team-visible roadmap data. v3.2 adds venture.webPresence pointer.

roadmap-business.description: Business canonical source — founder/investor-only financial and strategic data

venture-summary.description: DERIVED ARTIFACT. Generated by luhtech-transform. Never manually authored. v2.1 adds webPresence block.

venture-domains.description: Per-venture domain profile. T1 canonical source extracted from url-catalog.json.

transform-template.description: Governs the format of luhtech-transform template JSON files
